name: Mount of Olives
oracleText:
Mount of Olives enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {G}.
{1}, {T}: Tap target creature.
{3}, {T}: You gain 2 life and scry 1.
flavorText: "Not as I will, but as thou wilt." — Matthew 26:39
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Albrecht Durer's "Christ on the Mount of Olives" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.
title: Hill of Prayer

classics.license: Public domain; NGA open-access Commons file for a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Albrecht Durer, Christ on the Mount of Olives
classics.sourceNotes: Strong fit for the prayerful Mount of Olives scene, with a severe early-print look.
